side_effects.description: GLP-1 peptides turned cloudy when mixed with other peptides in the same syringe, presumably due to longer chains being more complex/delicate

protocol_notes: Takes 5-6 peptides per injection, morning and night, drawing from each relevant vial into one insulin syringe. Keeps GLP-1s in a separate syringe due to cloudiness when mixed. Does not pre-fill syringes for longer than a day or two for safety/hygiene reasons.
